heading: Implementation; penalties
label: 8809 Implementation; penalties
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b), was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle D (§§ 1241–1255) of title XII of div. A of , , , known as the Iran Freedom and Counter-Proliferation Act of 2012, which is classified principally to this chapter. children.heading: Implementation
children.label: a Implementation
children.text: The President may exercise all authorities provided under sections 1702 and 1704 of title 50 to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Penalties
children.label: b Penalties
children.text: The penalties provided for in subsections (b) and (c) of shall apply to a person that violates, attempts to violate, conspires to violate, or causes a violation of this chapter or regulations prescribed under this chapter to the same extent that such penalties apply to a person that commits an unlawful act described in .section 1705 of title 50section 1705(a) of title 50

children.heading: Application of certain provisions of Iran Sanctions Act of 1996
children.label: c Application of certain provisions of Iran Sanctions Act of 1996
